name: Ribbon Finance
description: Ribbon Finance (RBN) is a legacy Ethereum ERC-20 governance token for Ribbon DAO, a DeFi structured-products protocol. Official governance materials proposed folding Ribbon into Aevo and allowing RBN holders to migrate 1:1 into AEVO, so RBN should be tracked as a legacy governance/protocol token rather than a direct RWA claim asset.
subcategory: Structured Products / Legacy protocol governance token

_meta.notes: Ribbon docs describe Ribbon as a suite of DeFi protocols for crypto structured products. RGP-33 proposes migrating RBN to AEVO 1:1 and folding Ribbon into Aevo, so this record is intentionally classified as a legacy protocol/governance token.
